import React, { useState } from 'react'; const SimulationView = ({ onRunBatch }) => { const [scenario, setScenario] = useState('Mixed (Normal + Fraud)'); const [batchSize, setBatchSize] = useState(50); const [fraudRatio, setFraudRatio] = useState(15); const [maxAmount, setMaxAmount] = useState(10000); const [rules, setRules] = useState({ geo: true, velocity: true }); const handleRunBatch = () => { onRunBatch({ scenario, batchSize, fraudRatio, maxAmount, rules }); }; return (

Transaction Simulation Engine

Generate synthetic transactions to test anomaly detection rules and fraud scenarios

⚡ Simulation Controls

Scenario

Transactions per batch

{batchSize}

setBatchSize(parseInt(e.target.value))} style={{ width: '100%', accentColor: '#10b981' }} />

Fraud ratio

{fraudRatio}%

setFraudRatio(parseInt(e.target.value))} style={{ width: '100%', accentColor: '#10b981' }} />

Max Amount ($)

setMaxAmount(parseInt(e.target.value))} style={{ width: '100%', padding: '0.75rem', backgroundColor: '#0f172a', border: '1px solid #334155', borderRadius: '0.5rem', color: 'white' }} />

Fraud Scenarios

Geo Anomaly

setRules({...rules, geo: e.target.checked})} style={{ accentColor: '#10b981' }} />

Velocity Check

setRules({...rules, velocity: e.target.checked})} style={{ accentColor: '#10b981' }} />
⚡

Simulated Transactions

Configure parameters and run a simulation to generate synthetic transaction data.

); }; export default SimulationView;
